## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / capability
- [ ] Schema change (LinkML)
- [ ] Docs / tooling / CI
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `main` and scoped to a single concern
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Did not hand-edit generated artifacts in `outputs/`
- [ ] Updated `docs/` and any affected `MANIFEST.md` if applicable

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, tradeoffs, follow-ups. -->
